title: Ambikapathy
actors: M.K. Thyagaraja Bhagavathar, Serukalathun Sama, P.B. Rangachari
plot: The 2nd major South Indian historical. Set in the year 1083 A.D. it tells of the poet Kambar (Sama) who wrote the 'Kambaramayana' in Tamil at Karikala Chola's court. The film opens with the victorious return of Kulothunga Chola to...
